## Type of Change

- [ ] New feature

## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo test` passes (all tests)
- [ ] `cargo clippy -- -D warnings` is clean
- [ ] `cargo fmt --check` passes
- [ ] New functionality has tests
- [ ] No heap allocations added to the audio thread
- [ ] Determinism preserved (seeded randomness where applicable)
